name: vertical-depth-race-hud
description: Verify the depth race is an unframed vertical avatar track with player face, compact name, and no visible title panel.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') task.wait(.5) local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local hud=g.PixelPerfectHeroCityHUD local rank=hud.DepthRankHUD local track=rank and rank:FindFirstChild('DepthRaceTrack') local marker=track and track:FindFirstChild('HeroDepthMarker1') local name=marker and marker:FindFirstChild('HeroName') local title=rank and rank:FindFirstChild('RankTitleData') return H:JSONEncode({ok=rank~=nil and rank:GetAttribute('Layout')=='VerticalUnframed' and rank.BackgroundTransparency==1 and rank.AbsoluteSize.Y>rank.AbsoluteSize.X*1.8 and title and not title.Visible and marker and marker.Visible and marker.Image~='' and name and name.Text~='',layout=rank and rank:GetAttribute('Layout'),width=rank and rank.AbsoluteSize.X or 0,height=rank and rank.AbsoluteSize.Y or 0,titleVisible=title and title.Visible or false,markerVisible=marker and marker.Visible or false,avatar=marker and marker.Image or '',hero=name and name.Text or ''})
